title: Divine Conflict
description: "Now war arose in heaven, The Angels fought the Fallen. And the Fallen fought the Angels, but there was no longer any place for them in heaven."
body:
# **CHOOSE YOUR SIDE**

![a split image, on the left side is an angel gazing skyward. it has dark skin and white wings and robes. it's eyes, mouth, halo and belt are yellow. behind it is a clear blue sky with fluffy clouds and a floating island in the distance. on the right side is a grinning demon, it has light skin and dark, ragged clothes. it has purple cuffs around it's wrists, waist and neck which are attatched to each other with chains. in the background there is a dark red landscape, fire rises from the demon's feet and a lavafall pours from above. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89aed658a989c607a685f25a1f0509849554387b_0.webp)

Angels, Mortals, and Demons, after thousands of years of separation, have come into conflict once gain. Choose your origin, join a faction, and grow your strength with various RPG style mods. 
Each dimension has been overhauled, making the Nether and End more habitable and allowing the creation of Aether portals! Explore, Conquer Dungeons, Build Empires, ~~Screw over~~ Help your friends! 

_Best as a multtiplayer experience, but functional solo. Feel free to use this in your SMP!_
